test.template: Run `cargo test --all`. If any tests fail, diagnose and fix them. Report results.
test.description: Run all tests and fix failures

verify.template:
Run the full verification suite:
1. `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
2. `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
3. `cargo test --all`
4. `cargo machete`
Report pass/fail for each step. Fix any issues found.
